headline: Broadridge Launches Central Risk and Liquidity Optimization Solution to Unify Trade Execution, Liquidity and Risk Management
summary: Today, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), a global Fintech leader, announced the launch of its Central Risk and Liquidity Optimization Solution, powered by Tbricks. The new solution provides banks, broker-dealers, market makers, and trading firms with an integrated front-office platform to coordinate trade execution, risk, and liquidity management across products, desks, and venues through a single unified system.
